name: ADR-0008 carries the Consumer compatibility contract section (schema-additive with epoch + default)
command: grep -q '^## Consumer compatibility contract' "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/docs/adr/0008-composite-engine-and-4-axis-canonical-vocabulary.md" && grep -qi 'schema-additive with epoch' "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/docs/adr/0008-composite-engine-and-4-axis-canonical-vocabulary.md" && grep -q 'introduced_in' "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/docs/adr/0008-composite-engine-and-4-axis-canonical-vocabulary.md" && echo adr8-consumer-contract 1>&2
